description_long: This is a plush toy modeled after a cartoonish dinosaur, featuring a large, rounded head with an oversized mouth full of white, rounded teeth and a wide, expressive eye. Its body is predominantly teal with vibrant magenta and purple accents along the back, tail, and limbs, and it has a series of soft, spiky ridges running from the top of its head down to the tip of its tail. The toy's limbs are short and chubby, with three visible toes on each foot and three fingers on each hand, all ending in soft, rounded tips. The surface appears to be made of a soft, velvety fabric, and the toy is likely filled with plush stuffing, giving it a squeezable, huggable quality. The dinosaur's facial expression is playful and friendly, with a slightly open mouth that reveals a pink tongue and a cheerful demeanor. There are no visible clothing items or accessories, and the toy is designed to sit upright on its haunches.
description: A colorful, plush dinosaur toy with teal, magenta, and purple hues, featuring a large head, expressive eyes, and soft, spiky ridges along its back and tail. Its playful, friendly expression and chubby limbs make it appear huggable and inviting.
description_view_0: The toy is seen in profile, highlighting its large eye, open mouth with visible teeth, and the vibrant magenta and purple ridges along its back and tail.
description_view_1: A frontal view shows the wide, open mouth with white teeth and pink tongue, both arms raised, and the full roundness of the head and body.
description_view_2: The opposite profile displays the other side of the face, the second eye, and the continuation of the colorful ridges and spots along the body and tail.
description_view_3: The rear view emphasizes the spiky ridges running down the back and tail, as well as the rounded haunches and the toy's overall plump shape.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is playful and cheerful, with a wide, open mouth showing rounded teeth and a visible pink tongue, and large, bright eyes that give a friendly and inviting appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright on its haunches with both arms slightly raised and the head tilted upward, the tail curves gently behind the body.
